title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
